revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Hahime-jinja]][[ja:波比売神社]] {{Expand Japanese|波比売神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hahime Shrine | native_name = 波比売神社 | image = 波比売神社社殿 DEg1I6vXgAALym4.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hahime Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.341623|135.77333}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Mount Tochihara|lt=Mount Tochihara|ja|栃原岳|lld|Mont Tochihara|qid=Q11535103|1=Mount Tochihara}} | established = {'time': '+0730-00-00T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 9, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985786'} }} {{nihongo|'''Hahime Shrine'''|波比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần Tochihara|qid=Q11535103|1=Mount Tochihara}} == image of entrance (P9721) == * 波比売神社鳥居 DEgW3UCWAAA4IFm.jpg {{commons category|Category:Hahime-jinja}} [[JA:波比売神社]] {{wikidata link|Q38278473}} == Japanese content == {{?? |??=Hahime Shrine |??=[[Image:??????? DEg1I6vXgAALym4.jpg|270px]]
Shrine hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |???={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yoshino District|Q1154558|qid=Q1154558|1=Yoshino District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Shimoichi|Q1203064|qid=Q1203064|1=Shimoichi, Nara}} Tochihara 1807 | ??? = 34 | ??? = 20 | ??? = 30.2 | N(??)??S(??) = N | ??? = 135 |??? = 46 | ??? = 24 | E(??)??W(??) = E | ?????? = JP |??={{ill|lt=Mizuhanome-no-Kami|UNKNOWN|lt=Mizuhano-me-no-Kami}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor ?jin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |??={{ill|lt=Mount Tochihara|Q11535103|qid=Q11535103|1=Mount Tochihara}} ({{ill|lt=shintai-zan|Q1595289|qid=Q1595289|1=Sacred mountains}}) |??={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small) |??={{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} copper-roofed |??={{ill|lt=October 1|Q2913|qid=Q2913|1=October 1}} |??= Japan Nara }} '''Hahime Shrine''' (???????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Tochihara, {{ill|lt=Shimoichi|Q1203064|qid=Q1203064|1=Shimoichi, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Yoshino District|Q1154558|qid=Q1154558|1=Yoshino District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is an Engishiki-listed shrine near the summit of {{ill|lt=Mount Tochihara|Q11535103|qid=Q11535103|1=Mount Tochihara}}. === Chronology === * Founded on {{ill|lt=November 11|Q2987|qid=Q2987|1=November 11}}, Tenpy? 2 ({{ill|lt=730|Q23563|qid=Q23563|1=730}}) * In April, Ten'an 2 ({{ill|lt=858|Q30371|qid=Q30371|1=858}}), received Junior Fourth Rank, Lower ("{{ill|lt=Nihon Montoku Tenn? Jitsuroku|Q1052905|qid=Q1052905|1=Nihon Montoku Tennō Jitsuroku}}") * On {{ill|lt=June 23|Q2668|qid=Q2668|1=June 23}}, J?gan 6 ({{ill|lt=864|Q25041|qid=Q25041|1=864}}), received Senior Fourth Rank, Lower ("{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}") * On {{ill|lt=November 4|Q2994|qid=Q2994|1=November 4}}, J?gan 8 ({{ill|lt=866|Q23872|qid=Q23872|1=866}}), received Junior Third Rank ("Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku") * Burned down in a fire during the {{ill|lt=Bunki|Q1324885|qid=Q1324885|1=Bunki}} era (1501-1504) === Precincts === ????:DEgW3UCWAAA4IFm.jpg|Torii at trailhead ????:??????? DEg0-SyWsAIHY8H.jpg|Worship hall ????:??????? DEg6lr0XsAALlR5.jpg|Main hall === Miyaza ritual === The Miyaza ritual of Hahime Shrine is designated as an intangible cultural property by Shimoichi Town. Two parishioners are selected as yearly ritual households (older seat and younger seat), each only once in a lifetime, and they serve the shrine for one year. On the festival day only, the main hall is opened, a "transfer of divine spirit" is performed to ritual streamers, which are worshipped for seven days. At the end of September, both ritual households host relatives and associates and hold ceremonial offerings[http://www.town.shimoichi.lg.jp/0000000016.html Hahime Shrine] - Shimoichi Town, accessed July 13, 2017.. === Local info === '''Address''' * {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Yoshino District|Q1154558|qid=Q1154558|1=Yoshino District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Shimoichi|Q1203064|qid=Q1203064|1=Shimoichi, Nara}} Tochihara 1807 '''Access''' * From {{ill|lt=Shimoichiguchi Station|Q7496967|qid=Q7496967|1=Shimoichiguchi Station}} on Kintetsu Yoshino Line, take Nara Kotsu bus to "Kamitohihara" stop, then walk 20 minutes to the summit area (no weekend/holiday bus service) === Notes === {{?????}} {{Reflist}} === See also === {{Commonscat}} * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} === External links === * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/030910-01.html |title=Hahime Shrine |date=20181001125717}} {{?? ?}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hahime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hahime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Municipality Designated Intangible Folk Cultural Properties]] [[Category:下市町の建築物]] [[Category:下市町の歴史]][[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]]
